summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AQIS MVP - authentication, navigation, and core UI features working. Critical Groq AI integration failing due to API issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Groq API returning 400 Bad Request - AI analysis completely non-functional
critical_bugs.impact: Core AI features (query analysis, intent detection, urgency assessment, draft responses) not working
critical_bugs.details: Backend logs show 'HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request' from Groq API. Likely issue with API request format or authentication.

other_bugs.issue: Input validation not working - accepts empty description without returning 422
other_bugs.impact: Should validate required fields but returns 200 with error message instead

integration_issues.issue: AI analysis will fail due to backend Groq API issues

passed_tests: Member login (member1/member123) - shows My Assigned Queries in sidebar
Invalid login shows error message correctly
Theme toggle (sun/moon icon) switches between light/dark mode
Sidebar navigation - all links functional, disabled items properly greyed out
Cycle Management - create cycle 'MBA 2025-26', set active, displays in header badge
Upload Data page shows active cycle warning when no cycle set
User Management - add new users, toggle admin access, reset passwords
All page navigation working (Upload History, Analytics, SLA Monitor, Escalation Queue/Repository, Reports)
Query filters and search functionality present and functional
Role-based access control working (admin vs member permissions)
Logout functionality redirects to login page

critical_fixes: Fix Groq API integration - investigate 400 Bad Request error. Check API key, request format, and Groq API documentation for correct parameters
Add proper input validation to /api/ai/analyze endpoint to return 422 for invalid requests
action_item_for_main_agent.testing_limitation: Cannot test Excel upload functionality or Query Detail Drawer AI features without sample data upload. Need working Groq API to test complete query management workflow

success_percentage.backend: 25% - API structure works but core AI functionality broken
success_percentage.frontend: 90% - All UI components and navigation working, only AI-dependent features untestable
